member.name: M:Templates.ITtlTemplate.Generate(System.Object)
member.summary: Generates result string (invoke template helpers and render).

member.name: T:Templates.TtlTemplate
member.summary: Use this class to operate with engine, parse source template, make replace with data and generate result string.

member.name: M:Templates.TtlTemplate.Generate(System.Object)
member.summary: Generates result string (source template replaced with data). Data non-serialized

member.name: T:Templates.Attributes.ChainedTypeAttribute
member.summary: Attribute to set additional data type goes to template extension

member.name: M:Templates.Attributes.ChainedTypeAttribute.#ctor(System.Type)
member.summary: Sets additional data Type to template extension

member.name: T:Templates.Attributes.DataTypeAttribute
member.summary: Attribute to set main data type goes to template extension

member.name: M:Templates.Attributes.DataTypeAttribute.#ctor(System.Type)
member.summary: Sets main data Type to template extension

member.name: T:Templates.Attributes.EncodeOutputAttribute
member.summary: Attribute to mark extension be directly renderable to page, that means output data should be encoded by HTML encoder by default

member.name: T:Templates.Attributes.HiddenAttribute
member.summary: Prevents data property from vision in source template

member.name: T:Templates.Attributes.NameAttribute
member.summary: Attribute to mark every extension with name wich used in source template This attribute must set to any extension class

member.name: M:Templates.Attributes.NameAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Sets extension name
member.param: Extension name (empty string is reserved for )

member.name: T:Templates.Attributes.NotEncodeAttribute
member.summary: Prevents data property from HTML encoding

member.name: T:Templates.Attributes.OptionsAttribute
member.summary: Attribute to mark data property to set it's internal name in source template

member.name: M:Templates.Attributes.OptionsAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Sets data property name to use

member.name: T:Templates.Exceptions.TemplateParseException
member.summary: Parse Exception, at any stage can be raised

summary.para: Optional parameter represents string to show if condition is false
Optional parameter represents string to show if condition is true
Optional parameter represents default value if data name is not set in template or the object value is null
Optional parameter is sub-template (fully incluisive) wich represents one of element of the list.
Data should be formatted as ordinary source template. Required interface implemented for source data to be serialized.
Optional parameter contains culture string to format
Optional parameter represents default value if data name is not set in template or the object value is null
Optional Parameter represents string to format

member.name: T:Templates.Helpers.AttributeSet
member.summary: Attribute set helper to simple check existance/get attribute of any type/property/field etc.

member.name: P:Templates.Helpers.AttributeSet.AllAttributes
member.summary: Gets list of custom attributes of type/property/field etc.

member.name: M:Templates.Helpers.AttributeSet.GetIsPresentAttribute(System.Type)
member.summary: Gets attribute existance in type

member.name: M:Templates.Helpers.AttributeSet.GetAttribute``1
member.summary: Get attribute by type
member.typeparam: Type indicating which attribute need to get
member.returns: First Attribute object found of type T

member.name: M:Templates.Helpers.AttributeSet.GetAttributes``1
member.summary: Get typed attribute. Look into all custome attributes. Return collection of attributes found.

member.name: T:Templates.Helpers.ReflectionHelper
member.summary: Extends AttributeSet to perform more helper methods for Type reflection

member.name: P:Templates.Language.CallParameter.ModelParameter
member.summary: Use directly the ModelParameter or ChainParameter

member.name: P:Templates.Language.CallParameter.ChainParameter
member.summary: Use directly the ModelParameter or ChainParameter

member.name: T:Templates.Language.DefinitionItem
member.summary: Definition syntax element with inheritance support

member.name: T:Templates.Language.DocumentParser
member.summary: Parses document and creates template cache that can be used multiple times as source template representation, also used to replace templates with data multiple times (template source preserved)

member.name: M:Templates.Language.DocumentParser.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Performs parse of document
member.returns: Full template context tree found in source template

member.name: M:Templates.Native.MethodInfoHelper.CompileStaticAccessor``1(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Emit and compile delegate using Accessor via DynamicMethod. Static parameterless methods only, can be void result.

member.name: M:Templates.Native.MethodInfoHelper.CompileAccessor``2(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Emit and compile delegate using Accessor via DynamicMethod
member.typeparam: Either object to call method from or method parameter (depends weather method is static)

member.name: M:Templates.Native.MethodInfoHelper.CompileAccessor``3(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Emit and compile delegate using Accessor via DynamicMethod
member.typeparam: Either object to call method from or method parameter (depends weather method is static)

member.name: M:Templates.Native.MethodInfoHelper.CompileAccessor``4(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Emit and compile delegate using Accessor via DynamicMethod
member.typeparam: Either object to call method from or method parameter (depends weather method is static)

member.name: M:Templates.Native.MethodInfoHelper.CompileAccessor``5(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Emit and compile delegate using Accessor via DynamicMethod
member.typeparam: Either object to call method from or method parameter (depends weather method is static)

member.name: M:Templates.Native.MethodInfoHelper.CompileAccessor``6(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Emit and compile delegate using Accessor via DynamicMethod
member.typeparam: Either object to call method from or method parameter (depends weather method is static)

member.name: T:Templates.Runtime.CompileContext
member.summary: Compile Context class. Doing all work to compile extensions, saving type for each context level extension, import namespace/assembly. By loading assembly you can add or override existing extensions or add some extra funtionality parts to template.

member.name: M:Templates.Runtime.CompileContext.#ctor(Templates.Data.TemplateOptions)
member.summary: Create new untyped () initial level context to load and compile template from a file. Enclosing template level = 0

member.name: M:Templates.Runtime.CompileContext.#ctor(Templates.Runtime.CompileContext,System.String)
member.summary: Create new untyped () Context using old Context data with new template file name Enclosing template level = 0 Use for templates typed explicitly in template file but not in code.

member.name: M:Templates.Runtime.CompileContext.#ctor(Templates.Runtime.CompileContext,Templates.Data.ExType)
member.summary: Create new typed Context using old Context data just changing Type. Enclosing level = Old Context level + 1

member.name: M:Templates.Runtime.CompileContext.#ctor(Templates.Runtime.CompileContext,Templates.Data.ExType,System.String)
member.summary: Create new typed Context using old Context data, changing type and template file name. Enclosing template level = 0 Use for templates typed explicitly in code but not in template file.

member.name: P:Templates.Runtime.CompileContext.ModelType
member.summary: Model Type can be changed at any time you running your template extension. Be carefull changing this type without re-creating context. Recommendation is to change it only once maximum per chained template block. Used in <model> base extension.

member.name: M:Templates.Runtime.ContextCompilation.Compile(Templates.Runtime.CompileContext)
member.summary: Compile delayed Extensions, Compile all dynamic property references and connect into template chain.

member.name: T:Templates.Runtime.DocumentElement
member.summary: Recognized template in the source template

member.name: F:Templates.Runtime.DocumentElement._callChain
member.summary: Template chain to execute

member.name: P:Templates.Runtime.DocumentElement.Position
member.summary: Position in the source (start and end)

member.name: P:Templates.Runtime.DocumentElement.CallChain
member.summary: Template chain to execute

member.name: M:Templates.Runtime.IDataProcessor.ProcessData(System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: Processes template file with existing input data and additional data
member.returns: Generated string to be inserted in template instead of template

member.name: T:Templates.Runtime.IExtension
member.summary: Interface that should be implemented in every Template

member.name: T:Templates.Runtime.TemplateFactory
member.summary: Template factory, initializes and creates all templates

member.name: M:Templates.Runtime.TemplateFactory.LoadAddExtensionsFromAssembly(System.Reflection.Assembly)
member.summary: Loads all templates are in assembly

member.name: M:Templates.Runtime.TemplateFactory.Create(System.String,Templates.Language.ParseContext)
member.summary: Creates template by it's name and adds parameter string if it's present
member.param: Parser context, used to get defenitions list

member.name: M:Templates.Runtime.TemplateFactory.LoadBaseExtensions
member.summary: Loads all base templates

member.name: M:Templates.Runtime.TemplateFactory.LoadExtensions(System.Reflection.Assembly)
member.summary: Loads all templates in Assembly

member.name: M:Templates.Runtime.TemplateFactory.CreateExtension(System.Type)
member.summary: Creates Template Instance

member.name: T:Templates.Strings.Core.BlockPosition
member.summary: Represents posision of the template string to replace

member.name: T:Templates.Strings.Core.Replacement
member.summary: Represents parsed result data to replace source template template

member.name: F:Templates.Strings.Core.Replacement.ReplacementValue
member.summary: Replacement string
